Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1086 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Hey, nice work out there, {f 4 1}-kun. You're seriously leader material.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1095 0 0}Haha, well, aren't you oozing with confidence? But honestly, that's a reassuring trait to see in a leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1104 0 0}Yeah? Well, you know what they say: luck is just another word for skill.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1099 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 4 25 25}Who, me? Uh, yeah, no thanks. I'd be in way over my head.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}Unlike you, I'd just drop the ball when push comes to shove. I lose my cool way too easily.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Anyway, should we get going? After you, Leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}Nice work. These Gatekeeper guys are super tough, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Might be time to call it a day. What do you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1107 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Well, someone's motivated. Okay, let's see how far we can get, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Oh, no, that's not what I meant. I'm not tired. I just figured this might be a good stopping point.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I'm sure you have this expedition all planned out, so it's your call.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're on a roll, but what do you think, {f 4 1}-kun? Wanna keep going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1116 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}You got it! You think we'll make it to the next Gatekeeper?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1068 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Oh, are you tired? These Gatekeepers sure are a handful, aren't they?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}Well, yeah, I guess so... But that makes me sound like I'm usually not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}Not too long ago, I don't think we would've stood a chance against an enemy that tough.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Don't you think we've gotten even stronger...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1096 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Haha, thanks for the vote of confidence. That's real encouraging, coming from you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}When we first started out, it took everything I had just to summon my Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1122 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}Geez, would it kill you to compliment a girl every once in a while?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Kiiidding. Honestly, I prefer constructive criticism.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}Yeah, of course. We're not the only ones getting stronger.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}I won't let it go to my head, unlike a certain someone we both know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}Okay, let's keep moving. On to the next?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1086 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Phew... We won. Feels like I'm at the top of my game today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}Maybe it's because my horoscope said that Libras are supposed to be really lucky today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1095 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Haha, so you're the type to buy into superstitions? I totally get it. Like, you're skeptical, but they'll stay at the back of your mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}Yeah, I'm with you there. If only things were that simple...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1099 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 4 25 25}Really? I never took you as the type to be interested in—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 2 25 25}Hey... Is this some kinda ploy where you try to hold my hand?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}Oh, who am I kidding...? You're no Junpei.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}Well, they say luck is a skill, right? So it wouldn't hurt to believe in good omens...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 1}{f 4 23 1 2 4 25 25}Wait... Has the date changed already?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 1}Do horoscopes change during the Dark Hour!? Ugh... The curiosity is killing me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I guess you weren't too shabby either. Keep up the good work, bud.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2029 0 0}Remember, my dude, in times like these, teamwork is key.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2036 0 0}Haha, I'm just tryin' to hype you up, man. Don't worry, you're still the one callin' the shots.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2026 0 0}Hey, man, I got your back, so let's keep sharing the load.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2115 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}Phew... These guys are a serious workout compared to your average Shadow.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, I've still got gas in the tank, but how 'bout we make a quick pitstop?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Heheh, gotta know when to cash in your chips, am I right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}C'mon, I'll race ya to the nearest teleporter. On your marks... Get set... GO!!![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2099 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}Whaaat? For reals? Well, aren't you an overachiever.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}Whatever. I'll keep you company, dude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2085 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}Whoa there, h-hold up... I was worried YOU were running on empty, not me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}But if you're gonna keep going, I got your back. Just don't push it, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Damn, look at us go. Nothing can stop us now! Execution Squad, move out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2108 0 0}Glad to see you brought your A game. Between you and me, we've got the next fight in the bag.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2101 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}Hold up... You're seriously calling it quits?[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Welp, I guess this is as good a time as any for an intermission. The second half of the Junpei Spectacular can always wait for next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2110 0 0}Ambitious, ain'tcha? Not that I got a problem with that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Alright, let's bounce.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}Is it just me, or are these Shadows upping their game? How much stronger are they gonna get?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_049_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We just gotta up our game, too.

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2115 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}For real. Maybe they don't even have a limit, but we just gotta bust through 'em.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2115 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}Well, we can forget about things getting easier down the line...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2115 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}Yeah, sure, but that's easier said than done, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}And, hey, don't get me wrong. I ain't scared of 'em or anything, alright?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 2 25 25}Heck, I'm hashin' out big plans to finish 'em off in style as we speak...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}Yo, what's with that look? You don't believe me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 9 25 25}In baseball terms, you could say the team ace, Iori, pitched a complete game and totally shut out the opponent.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2075 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Okay, let me put it this way: I was the cleanup hitter, and I hit the ball outta the park to score us that huge win.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2110 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Ooh, look at you, talkin' big. But there's enough room in the Hall of Fame for the two of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Anyway, the bottom line is that you need a team with powerful batters and a strong bullpen in order to—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}Wait, what were we talkin' about again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Your directions were on point, and you managed to keep your cool against a tough opponent.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3106 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}Heh, all right, hotshot. I see we're in good hands.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3094 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}Haha, so you wore a poker face the whole time? That's brilliant.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3088 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}What, being humble in front of your senpai?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}Just remember, seniority means nothing on the battlefield, so don't hold back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}All right, time to move on. Stay sharp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3085 0 0}Great. Now we'll be able to move on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's always the option to turn back, too. What's your call, {f 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3113 0 0}Gotcha. We'll take things at your pace.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3113 0 0}No worries, go ahead. Take your time to assess the situation—there's no need to rush.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 9 25 25}So what's the plan? I'm down to knock out the next Gatekeeper if you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3108 0 0}That's the spirit. I'm willing to stick it out for the long haul if you are.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's fine. There's no reason you should have to force yourself to press forward. Our opponents aren't going anywhere.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3028 0 0}Sure, go for it. I'm still good to go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}All right, let's get moving. We're counting on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3002 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}That last opponent sure packed a punch. It made for a good fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}The tougher the opponent, the more pumped up you get. Don't you agree?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3025 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 9 25 25}Glad we see eye-to-eye. After all, the only way to get stronger is by pushing your limits.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3047 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}Really? Hm... I guess taking care of those weaker opponents could be good training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3028 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}Fair point. You won't glean much from fighting an opponent way out of your league.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But sometimes, facing off against a heavyweight might get you to the next level.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}Now then... Care to find out what's waiting for us up ahead?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3108 0 0}No matter how many times I see you fight, I still can't believe my eyes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just how on earth are you swapping your Personas out at will?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3106 0 0}You say that, but you've taken to it like a fish to water. You know, I think there's something special about you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_087_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3027 0 0}I suppose you are kind of an oddball, in a manner of speaking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But you can't be the only one... I'm sure someone else out there has the same ability as you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3131 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}Haha, I appreciate the offer, but I already have my hands full training with the one I've got.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}At any rate, having you around has opened us up to more battle strategies, so let's keep capitalizing on that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4107 0 0}Excellent—a perfect victory. All thanks to your precise orders, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}I'm sure it's tough to lead the team, but evidently, you're quite up to the task.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_093_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4106 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}I admire your tenacity. That kind of drive will lead to further growth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}Indeed it is. Fulfilling the role of a leader requires both mind and matter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}Of course, I'll try to help out wherever I can. That said, please don't act recklessly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now then, let's get back to business.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_096_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}Somehow, we pulled through. Those Gatekeepers are truly a cut above the rest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}This would be an ideal time to regroup, but what say you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_098_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4115 0 0}Fine by me. It's best to be prepared for all possible contingencies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_099_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}I take it you want to ride the momentum to seize our next victory? Very well. I'll leave it to your discretion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_100_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4065 0 0}Fair enough. There's no rule of thumb for when to retreat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}Whatever you choose, I'll stand by your decision. Lead on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_101_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4085 0 0}Now then, the path is clear. Shall we proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}You seem to be in fine form tonight. Very well, let's get back to work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}All right. Then let's make for the entrance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}I can rest easy with you at the reins. Keep up the good work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_106_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}How many Gatekeepers does that make? They're becoming more ferocious by the minute, aren't they?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's likely you'll face greater tactical challenges moving forward, but I trust you'll be fine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4039 0 0}Needless to say, we'll do our utmost to support you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_109_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4045 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}Well, I know you can handle it. Don't doubt yourself, just keep doing what you've been doing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_110_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}I'm afraid not, but trust me, you're more than capable. And I'll support you as best I can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_112_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}We'll be able to progress now, but... how high do you suppose this tower is?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_114_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4028 0 0}I believe we still have a long road ahead of us, but part of our job is to find out for certain.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_115_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4027 0 0}I wish that was true, but from the looks of things, we've still a ways to go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_116_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4027 0 0}That's true. But one thing we can be certain of is that, come what may, we will eventually reach our goal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_117_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I'm not losing my nerve, of course, mind you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Having made it this far is a remarkable feat in itself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}For now, let's keep paving a path forward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_118_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6012 0 0}Enemy Shadow annihilated. You possess superlative decision-making skills, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_120_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Yes, learning that team coordination is equally as important as individual strengths has proved insightful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_121_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6037 0 0}The odds of an operation being streamlined by chance is astronomically low. I suspect you are being modest, as per usual.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_122_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6039 0 0}Thank you. That battle was "easy-peasy lemon squeezy," as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_123_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now, let us resume our exploration.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_124_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6012 0 0}High-level threat eliminated. How is everyone's current condition?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you are experiencing fatigue, then I recommend we return early.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_126_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Understood. Then let us return to the entrance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_127_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}That is very "magnifique," as they say. Then let us resume our exploration.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_128_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}This is the time to be decisive. As such, you must make the final call, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whatever you decide, I shall be at your side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_129_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6012 0 0}Gatekeeper Shadow eliminated. While this may be a good stopping point...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Should we press forward instead?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_131_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Understood. In that case, let us "roll n' rock," as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_132_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}I see. Very well. Let us return and recuperate in preparation for our next battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_133_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6030 0 0}Of course. This is my mission, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_134_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6012 0 0}Threat eliminated. Mission complete.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Which reminds me: have you adjusted to Shifting and using Theurgy in battle?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_136_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Both are useful in battle. It would be for the best if you were to utilize them more efficiently.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_137_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6058 0 0}I see. In other words, you have yet to utilize them in battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is this what they call "saving the best for last"? Your potential truly is limitless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_138_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}I expected nothing less from {f 4 2}-san. Your mastery of tactics is second to none.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_139_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I will also fight without restraining my power. The upcoming battles will surely test our strength.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_140_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6012 0 0}Cleanup operation, complete. Enemies of this caliber are like sitting kappa.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_142_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Oh, good. Perhaps the kappa will be happy for us as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_143_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}Right, they were not sitting, were they? I should have said they were like "standing kappa" instead. Idioms are difficult.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_144_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}I was informed it is an idiom that describes an easy or defenseless target.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_145_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}By the way... what manner of creature is Mr. Kappa? I would like to meet him one day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_146_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6008 0 0}Enemy Shadow eliminated. That was a well-orchestrated attack, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_148_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6027 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 1 25 25}Yes, a well-coordinated team is essential to achieving victory, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_150_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6039 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 1 25 25}Thank you. I just want to do what I can to best fulfill my role.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_151_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 0 25 25}Now then, let's resume our exploration.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_152_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6087 0 0}Mission accomplished. Is anyone hurt?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you feel tired, please don't push yourself too hard and head back instead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_154_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6025 0 0}Understood. Let's make for the first floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_155_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6025 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 1 25 25}Roger that! We want to ride this momentum, correct?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_156_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6027 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 1 25 25}They do say, "Haste makes waste." It's all right to take your time to weigh all your options.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 0 25 25}The decision is yours, {f 4 2}-san. I trust you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_157_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6009 0 0}Great job, everyone. Now, we could stop here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I think we can keep going. What do you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_160_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6107 0 0}Understood. Then let's head back to the entrance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_161_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6118 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 1 25 25}Of course! I want to do all that I can, fighting alongside everyone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_162_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whether Shift or Theurgy, you're proficient in every tactic at your disposal now, aren't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_164_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6131 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 1 25 25}You're not one to brag, are you, {f 4 2}-san? Hehe, we're fortunate to have you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_166_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6061 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 1 25 25}You've made it this far, so I think you're allowed to be confident in yourself. Don't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_167_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'll also prepare myself for our final battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_168_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6087 0 0}We took them down easily. They were practically sitting kappa.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_170_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6132 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 1 25 25}Hehe, no offense to Mr. Kappa, but the expression is a bit amusing, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_171_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6073 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 3 25 25}Oh? Should I have said "standing kappa" instead...? Idioms are difficult.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_172_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 1 25 25}Junpei-san taught me that idiom. It describes an easy or defenseless target.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_173_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 7 0 25 25}By the way... what kind of creature is Mr. Kappa? I'd love to meet him one day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_174_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}That win was all thanks to your instructions, {f 4 1}-san![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_176_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}The leader has to issue precise orders for the team to function properly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_177_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7132 0 0}Haha, well, of course everyone contributes by combining all our individual strengths as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}But the leader is the one who puts all the pieces together. And you're good at it, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_178_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}I think I'm a lot stronger fighting alongside everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_179_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, sorry. That kinda came out of nowhere.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's just that I've always felt this way, so I wanted to tell you myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, let's keep this up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_180_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7115 0 0}Phew, these Gatekeepers are a lot tougher than the typical Shadow wandering around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Should we keep going? Or is it time we take a break?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_182_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7132 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}Good idea. Let's head back to the entrance, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_183_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7108 0 0}I see... You're a man of steel, aren't you, {f 4 1}-san?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}Oh, but I'm also good to go! Let's see how far we can get.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_184_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}This is a good stopping point, so it's hard to decide, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well, just let me know when you've made up your mind. I'm fine either way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_185_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7087 0 0}...I think I had a small breakthrough during that last fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is it okay if we keep going? I'd like to reinforce what I picked up while it's still fresh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_187_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7116 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}Thank you. I'll do my best to make myself useful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_188_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}Okay, that's fine. We can just pick up from here next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_189_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7026 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}I trust your decision, but if we can carry on, then let's.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_190_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7115 0 0}How many Gatekeeper Shadows do you think there are total?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 3 25 25}They keep getting tougher, which means there could be some really strong ones waiting for us up ahead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_191_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hope that was the last of them.

Dialog.name: MSG_193_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7063 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 0 25 25}If only... That'd be nice, but in the end, it's just wishful thinking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_194_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7120 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}That's true. We should just focus on the enemies in front of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_195_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 2 25 25}I need to train harder so that I can be ready to face any foe, no matter how strong they might be.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_196_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7088 0 0}Phew, there we go. Glad that's over.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}These Gatekeepers sure are tough. Imagine if every enemy on a floor was a Gatekeeper.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_198_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7120 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 3 25 25}Haha, I know I'm the one who brought it up, but thinking about it sent a shiver down my spine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_199_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7120 0 0}Yeah, it'd definitely keep us on our toes... Then again, we're always on edge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_200_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7103 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 4 25 25}Huh? You really think so!? {f 4 1}-san, you sound super confident![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 3 25 25}Meanwhile, I'm getting chills just picturing it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_201_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 2 25 25}There's no knowing what kind of tricks they have up their sleeve. Let's stay alert.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_203_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru seems happy we won.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_205_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll give you a treat later, okay?

Dialog.name: MND_207_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru looks proud of himself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_210_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru seems to be panting heavily.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Did that last battle wear him out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_214_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru seems to be on board.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Heading back is probably the right idea...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_216_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like Koromaru is psyching himself up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}He seems willing to go the extra mile...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_218_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru seems to be on board.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's up to me to decide whether[n]we forge ahead or pull back...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_220_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru is in a good mood.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_224_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru seems determined.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_226_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru seems to be on board.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_228_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru seems determined.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_231_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Nice work. You too, Koro-chan.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Since the enemies are getting stronger, we'll need to be even more cautious moving forward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_234_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Heehee, are you feeling confident too, Koro-chan? Looks like there's courage aplenty here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_236_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Koro-chan's cheering you on. He's got your back![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_238_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Heehee, looks like someone's full of spirit. We'll be counting on you, Koro-chan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_240_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5011 0 0}The Gatekeeper has been defeated! Thanks for all your hard work, everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_242_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I know I'm just stating the obvious here, but Koro-chan sure is amazing, isn't he?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}He's so cooperative and a great team-player. It's almost like he understands everything we say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_245_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Heehee, Koro-chan looks so happy. See? He does understand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_246_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5037 0 0}N-No, it can't be. You understand us, don't you, Koro-chan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_248_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}See? Look how sad he is. I'm sure he understands what we're saying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_250_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Heehee, Koro-chan looks so happy. See? He does understand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_251_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 4 23 1 9 0 25 25}Keep up the good work, Koro-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_254_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}You're better than I thought. I can see why Aki hyped you up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_256_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9024 0 0}I got your back, so do what you gotta do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_257_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9098 0 0}Heh, best to stay humble. Pride's just gonna get you killed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_258_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9102 0 0}...Well, yeah. I can't afford to be holding back either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_260_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9101 0 0}There goes that pain in the neck.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Want to call it here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_262_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9107 0 0}Smart. Head back and rest or whatever to get ready for the next trip.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_263_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9108 0 0}Gotcha. Well, you're the leader. I'll just stick with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_264_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9070 0 0}Up to you. Just don't bite off more than you can chew.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_265_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're gonna keep goin', right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_267_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9098 0 0}{f 4 23 1 10 1 25 25}Heh, glad we're on the same page. I've got plenty of fuel to burn myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_268_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9057 0 0}That's fine. This ain't a bad stopping point either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_269_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}'Course, I ain't feelin' too bad myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_271_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9104 0 0}Stubborn bastard, wasn't it? No match for us, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are gonna be even tougher fights down the road, so be ready for that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_273_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9069 0 0}Don't mean to put you on the spot or anything, but our victory's ridin' on you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's see you get it done, Leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_274_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 10 0 25 25}A little bravado's fine, but don't get too cocky or it'll bite you in the ass.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_275_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, don't go passing the baton to me. There's no guarantee I'll always be around, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_276_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Alright, let's get going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_277_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Don't go wastin' your time on these kinda enemies.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_279_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}I dunno how big this place is, but can't hurt to try and make some progress.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_280_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}But can't hurt to try and make some progress either, especially when I'm in the mood.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_281_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9114 0 0}What, would you tell me off if I were? I ain't made of glass, so worry about yourself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll do my job, and I'll do it damn well. So rest easy and do yours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_284_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}What's wrong, Junpei-kun? Something on your mind?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_285_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}Nah, it's nothing, just... You know those Shadows with books on their heads?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Like the one we fought just now? What's even written inside that book?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_286_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}Oh, I was wondering the same thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}We'll catch glimpses from time to time, but it's hard to tell while fighting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_287_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2026 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Right? I mean, I don't give a crap about the words...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}But if there are photo collections of pretty models, like in manga magazines, then...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_288_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Have you ever wondered how those scale-shaped Shadows stand upright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_289_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Ah, the balance types. I imagine they'd struggle with standing upright and moving around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_290_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you suppose there's a reason they look the way they do?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Moreover... I'm actually quite tempted to tip them over.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's move along, Leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_291_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6012 0 0}Enemy defeated. Requesting our next directive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_293_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Affirmative. Though Tartarus may be a colossal tower...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}With constant, incremental progress, we will gradually reach our objective.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}A journey of a thousand miles begins by first treading without fear, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_294_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6024 0 0}Understood. Better safe than sorry, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}They also say, "Haste makes waste," and, "Slow and steady wins the race."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Though... is it not more optimal to be fast and steady instead?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_295_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6058 0 0}...I had not anticipated a query in response to my query.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is this what they call "getting blindsided"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I do not have any blind side to speak of, so does this not apply to me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_296_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}A-Aigis, you sure know some unusual phrases. Where did you learn about them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_297_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have a daily academic regimen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just the other day, Junpei-san taught me how to write haikus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}"Oh my Tartarus... Dark, decrepit Tartarus... Why are you so tall?"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_298_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3085 0 0}Great. Now we'll be able to progress.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_299_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}What do you think, {f 4 1}? Any concerns moving forward?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_301_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3131 0 0}That confidence of yours sure is reassuring. I'm sure everyone else on the team thinks so, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_302_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Keep it up. I'll back you up in any way I can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_303_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3093 0 0}Ah... I understand where you're coming from.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_304_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}But you're doing great. Don't panic, keep moving forward, and you'll be fine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_305_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3060 0 0}Well, we've been on the front lines for some time now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_306_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}So I just wanted to remind you to reach out if you ever need anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_307_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}You seem... calmer than before. It's a really welcome change.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_308_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}Heh, you just had to add that last bit. A "welcome change," huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, let's get going. We still have a long road ahead of us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_309_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5002 0 0}How does it feel to be back in action, Amada-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_310_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}Great, actually. Thanks for asking, Fuuka-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_311_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'd like to thank you as well, {f 4 1}-san—for letting me on the front lines.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 2 25 25}I want to get even stronger so I can help make things easier on everyone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_313_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7040 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}Just watch me. I promise I'll follow through.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_314_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7052 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}Haha, I don't need any spoiling, you know? Besides, I'm a growing boy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_316_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}By the way, Amada-kun... I caught a glimpse of you from behind just now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}I think you might have gotten taller.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_317_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}Maybe it's because of all the milk I drink, hehe.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_318_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}Okay, {f 4 1}-san. Shall we get going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_320_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Way to go, everyone. Let's keep it up, and—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_321_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}Oh, hold that thought, Yukari-chan...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Are those... blisters on your hands?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_322_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}Yeah... They're just a little bit blistered. I can still shoot just fine, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_324_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Um... I just noticed you seemed a little different from usual.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}I have bandages and other first aid stuff, so let me know if you need anything, okay, Yukari-chan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_325_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}I agree. Fortunately, it doesn't seem too bad right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}But I can wrap your hands with some bandages if the blisters are bothering you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_326_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}I think we should. Fortunately, it doesn't seem too bad right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}But if you do take a break, I'll keep an eye on the perimeter for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_327_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I get this feeling you've been looking out for us more than usual lately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_328_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}R-Really? I'm glad I could at least do that much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}After all, my role here is to support everyone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Well, shall we get going, Leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_330_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even though the "theory" about defeating the Shadows that appear during a full moon was just a trick...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure there's something here that can help us get rid of the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_332_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}Honestly, I'd be surprised if there wasn't anything at all...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}At this point, all we can do is find out for ourselves—especially since this is a job only we can do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_333_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1095 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Haha, that'd seriously suck. But even if we swing and miss, it's not like we have anything to lose, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}If there's nothing at all, then we've eliminated one possibility. That means we just have to start looking somewhere else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_334_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}It's definitely best to get as far as we can rather than sitting around, mulling over hypotheticals.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_335_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's incredible how you always find a silver lining, Yukari-chan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_336_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}Honestly, half of it is probably just me putting up a front, but the other half is thanks to you, Fuuka.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}Thank you for giving me that recording.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_338_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}All right! Time to get going! Lead the way, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_339_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2086 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Everyone, line up! Since we're on a roll, how 'bout we put the pedal to the metal?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_341_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}Damn right I am. Figured just mopin' around wasn't gonna get me anywhere.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_342_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}We'll get some answers eventually, so why not fight here while we wait? At least we'll get stronger.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sometimes you just gotta look at the bright side and do what you gotta do, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_343_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2123 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}You're totally missing my point, dude. I didn't mean getting faster, I meant getting psyched up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_344_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}Rather than think about this or that, we've got more to gain from knocking down a Shadow or two, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sure, we're in the dark now, but things will work out on their own, trust me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_345_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2105 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}Well, that's your call, but don't forget—sometimes you gotta ride the momentum.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_346_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}Trust me, I totally get where you're coming from. One nasty plot twist, and we're suddenly back at square one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}That said, I think we oughta put in effort to get stronger, so we'll be ready for anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_347_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Whether we press on or pull back, I've got your back, dude.[n]{f 1 1}
